title: Bounded Promise Workers, Origin Fairness, Failure Isolation, and Drain
description: Promise.all launches every source, one rejection hides other settlements, one publisher consumes slots, abort listeners accumulate, and shutdown does not await workers. Learners cumulatively produce origin-aware bounded async ingestion pool through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Derive global, origin, tenant, database, memory, queue, and event-loop budgets and enforce the tightest active limit.
Track queued, running, settling, canceled, failed, and completed jobs with exactly one owner and one terminal result.
Schedule per-origin work without monopolization while respecting per-publisher cadence and useful global throughput.
